nasb.text: While he was still speaking, another also came and said, “Your sons and your daughters were eating and drinking wine in their oldest brother’s house,

esv.text: While he was yet speaking, there came another and said, “Your sons and daughters were eating and drinking wine in their oldest brother’s house,

cnv.text: 他還在說話的時候，又有人來說：“你的兒女正在他們長兄的家裡吃飯喝酒的時候，

ccb.text: 话音未落，又有人来报信说：“你的儿女正在长兄家吃喝的时候，
